problem: A mid-size software company needs to choose a strategy for migrating its monolithic application to the cloud.

options.label: Lift-and-shift
options.description: Move the monolith as-is to cloud VMs with minimal code changes.

options.label: Re-architect to microservices
options.description: Decompose into microservices deployed on Kubernetes.

options.label: Hybrid strangler-fig
options.description: Incrementally extract services while keeping the monolith running.

problem: A hospital must select a system for managing electronic health records (EHR) across 12 departments.

options.label: Commercial off-the-shelf EHR
options.description: License a leading vendor solution (e.g., Epic or Cerner).

options.label: Open-source EHR with in-house customization
options.description: Deploy OpenMRS and customize with internal IT team.

options.label: Cloud-native SaaS EHR
options.description: Subscribe to a cloud-only EHR service with API integrations.

problem: A logistics company wants to reduce last-mile delivery costs in urban areas.

options.label: Crowdsourced delivery network
options.description: Use gig-economy drivers for on-demand delivery.

options.label: Micro-fulfillment centers
options.description: Deploy small automated warehouses within city limits.

options.label: Electric cargo bike fleet
options.description: Replace vans with e-cargo bikes for short-distance urban routes.

problem: A university must decide how to deliver a new data science master's program.

options.label: Fully online asynchronous
options.description: Pre-recorded lectures with flexible deadlines and online exams.

options.label: Hybrid cohort model
options.description: Bi-weekly in-person intensives combined with online coursework.

options.label: Traditional on-campus
options.description: Full-time residential program with lab access and face-to-face instruction.

problem: A fintech startup needs to choose a primary database technology for its real-time payments platform.

options.label: PostgreSQL with Citus extension
options.description: Relational database with horizontal sharding for distributed queries.

options.label: Apache Cassandra
options.description: Wide-column NoSQL store optimized for write-heavy workloads.

options.label: CockroachDB
options.description: Distributed SQL database with strong consistency and geo-partitioning.

problem: A retail chain must choose a strategy for its brick-and-mortar stores given declining foot traffic.

options.label: Convert to experience centers
options.description: Redesign stores as showrooms with immersive product demos and events.

options.label: Downsize and optimize
options.description: Close underperforming locations, invest in omnichannel fulfillment.

options.label: Franchise model
options.description: License the brand to local operators to reduce corporate overhead.

problem: A government agency needs to select an approach for digitizing 30 years of paper archives.

options.label: In-house scanning center
options.description: Build a dedicated facility with industrial scanners and trained staff.

options.label: Outsource to a digitization vendor
options.description: Contract a specialized firm to handle scanning, OCR, and indexing.

options.label: Phased community partnership
options.description: Partner with universities and volunteers for gradual digitization.

problem: An energy company must decide how to meet a 40% carbon reduction target by 2030.

options.label: Invest in solar and wind farms
options.description: Build utility-scale renewable generation assets.

options.label: Carbon capture and storage (CCS)
options.description: Retrofit existing fossil-fuel plants with CCS technology.

options.label: Power purchase agreements (PPAs)
options.description: Buy renewable energy from third-party producers via long-term contracts.

problem: A pharma company needs to choose a clinical trial design for a new oncology drug.

options.label: Traditional randomized controlled trial (RCT)
options.description: Standard two-arm parallel RCT with fixed sample size.

options.label: Adaptive platform trial
options.description: Multi-arm trial that can add/drop arms based on interim analyses.

options.label: Decentralized virtual trial
options.description: Remote patient enrollment with wearable monitoring and telemedicine visits.

problem: A city government must choose a public transit expansion strategy for a growing metropolitan area.

options.label: Light rail extension
options.description: Extend existing light-rail lines into suburban corridors.

options.label: Bus rapid transit (BRT)
options.description: Dedicate lanes and stations for high-frequency express buses.

options.label: On-demand micro-transit
options.description: Deploy AI-routed shared shuttle vans covering underserved zones.
